headline: P&L exposure: ₹590 Cr direct fraud loss (from article) + ₹407.1 Cr cascading regulatory and reputational costs (engine estimate) (of ₹997.1 Cr canonical event exposure)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.2-0.3x likely; margin erosion of 223.5 bps; direct revenue at risk of ₹73.8 Cr (engine estimate).
Cost of capital expected to rise by 20-40 bps as per BRSR/SEBI triggers; potential for bond spread widening and FII outflows.

Triggers BRSR, GRI:205 (rationale: Triggered by any fraud disclosure, bribery allegation, insider trading investigation, or ED/CBI action. Also referenced for ISO 37001 certification.), GRI:207 (rationale: Triggered by GST demand notices, transfer-pricing disputes, tax-disclosure gaps, or related-party transaction investigation. Complements ESRS G1.), ESRS G1; SEBI scrutiny and possible trading restrictions; regulatory penalties up to ₹132.8 Cr (engine estimate).
action: Quantify exposure: ₹590 Cr direct fraud loss (from article) + ₹407.1 Cr cascading regulatory and reputational costs (engine estimate) (of ₹997.1 Cr canonical event exposure)
Revenue at risk: ₹73.8 Cr direct revenue loss (engine estimate)
